purpose_context: Completes Phase B of the service-placement remediation (architecture/2.x/initiatives/2026-05-stable-application-api-surface/api-service-placement-assessment.md). Moves the four dashboard domain services and their registries from dashboard/services/ into specify_cli/missions/, fixes the list_missions() cache-staleness bug (Robert's P1 from PR #970), and replaces the WeakValueDictionary WP-registry store with an explicit strong-reference cache (P2). Establishes the canonical read surface required as groundwork for the domain-boundary repair epic (#992).
purpose_tldr: Move dashboard domain services to specify_cli/missions/; fix cache bugs; set groundwork for #992
